nl_query: For each active evaluation attempt, show the script URN, student name, evaluator name, assignment type, attempt type, section name if split, current status, total marks, and the number of marks entries.
failed_sql:
SELECT a.urn, sc.name AS student_name, fc.name AS evaluator_name, sa.attempt_type AS script_assignment_type, ea.attempt_type AS evaluation_attempt_type, qs.name AS section_name, ea.status, ea.total_marks, COUNT(em.id) AS num_evaluation_marks
FROM   evaluation_attempt ea
JOIN   answer_script      a  ON a.id  = ea.script_id
JOIN   faculty_cache           fc ON fc.employee_id = ea.evaluator_id
JOIN   script_assignment      sa ON sa.script_id = a.id
JOIN   question_section      qs ON qs.id = sa.section_id
JOIN   evaluation_marks   em ON em.attempt_id = ea.id
WHERE  ea.is_active = TRUE
GROUP BY a.urn, sc.name, fc.name, sa.attempt_type, ea.attempt_type, qs.name, ea.status, ea.total_marks
ORDER BY a.urn, ea.attempt_type, ea.status
error: Validation failed (schema): Ambiguous column reference: 'name'. It exists in multiple tables (faculty_cache, question_section). You must qualify it with a table alias.
